subcodes.first_line: Mukuru wandje! Mukuru wandje! Hwikika otjiuru tjandje no tjikrone tjohange, kotjiuru tjandje vava ko nomaze omawa, Ove t
subcodes.notes: Theory: AB supplication in Otjiherero -- "Mukuru wandje! Mukuru wandje! Hwikika otjiuru tjandje..." = "O my Lord! O my Lord! Quicken my heart and spirit..." From old Otjiherero book. Not found in inventory.
